introSection: Butaten Kids Coaster (Japanese: ブタ天キッズコースター) is steel family roller coaster located at Tokyo German Village.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train resembles a flying pig.

fullText:
Butaten Kids Coaster (Japanese: ブタ天キッズコースター) is steel family roller coaster located at Tokyo German Village.

Red track and yellow supports.

The train resembles a flying pig.
